title: Sissy's Butterfly Garden Coloring Page
alt: A big butterfly in the middle of a flower garden, drawn as bold outlines to color in.
blurb: A big butterfly and four flowers, ready for your best colors.

title: A Meadow of Flowers Coloring Page
alt: Three large simple flowers and a star, drawn as bold outlines for a young child to color.
blurb: Big, simple flowers with lots of room for color.

title: Make a Paper Butterfly
alt: A craft card with four steps to fold and cut a paper butterfly, plus a grown-up helper note and safety line.
blurb: Fold, cut, and decorate a butterfly friend from one sheet of paper.

title: Meadow Friends Word Search
alt: A ten-by-ten letter grid word search hiding the names of Sissy and her meadow friends.
blurb: Find Sissy, Addy, Buddy, and Flitter hiding in the grid.

title: Butterfly Connect-the-Dots
alt: A connect-the-dots puzzle: numbered dots that draw a butterfly outline to color.
blurb: Connect the dots in order to reveal a butterfly, then color it.

title: Count the Meadow Counting Sheet
alt: A counting worksheet with rows of butterflies, flowers, and stars to count and write.
blurb: Count the butterflies, flowers, and stars, then write the number.

title: Sissy's Meadow Hop Board Game
alt: A printable roll-and-move board game with a winding path from start to finish.
blurb: Roll a die and hop along the meadow path to the finish.

title: Rainbow Breaths Calm-Down Card
alt: A social-emotional calm-down card with five gentle rainbow breathing steps for big feelings.
blurb: A gentle breathing game for big feelings - breathe a calm rainbow.

title: The Flutter Song Lyric & Action Sheet
alt: A sing-and-move lyric sheet set to Twinkle, Twinkle, with an action for every line.
blurb: New butterfly words to Twinkle, Twinkle - with an action for every line.

title: Butterfly Teacher Pack (Book 1 Companion)
alt: A one-page teacher and read-aloud companion for the first Sissy the Butterfly book: an introduction, a discussion question, and a go-do activity.
blurb: A free read-aloud companion for Book 1: intro, a talk-about-it question, and a go-do.

title: Make Your Own Meadow Map
alt: A make-your-own template inviting a child to draw and name their own map of the meadow.
blurb: Draw and name your very own map of Sissy's meadow.

title: Courage Quote Poster
alt: A printable poster with a gentle courage quote from Sissy the Butterfly for a child's wall.
blurb: A gentle courage quote for the bedroom wall or classroom.
